title: Add bottom-right floating plus button to open PostTaskModal

requirements.text: Add a fixed floating action button (FAB) in the bottom-right corner of the HubView that, when clicked, opens the existing PostTaskModal for creating a new task. The button should display a '+' icon, be visually prominent using the app's green-to-purple gradient style, and be always visible while the user is on the hub view.

quotes: let the user post their task by clicking on the botton right plus button

acceptanceCriteria: A circular FAB with a '+' icon is fixed to the bottom-right corner of the HubView (e.g., bottom-6 right-6 with z-index above task cards).
Clicking the FAB opens the PostTaskModal.
The FAB uses the app's green-to-purple gradient consistent with other active/primary controls in the app.
The FAB is visible on both mobile and desktop layouts.
Any existing 'Post Task' button or trigger in the HubView that duplicates this action is either removed or left in place without conflict.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Reuse the existing PostTaskModal component — do not create a new modal.
nonGoals: Changes to the PostTaskModal form itself.
Any new task creation logic beyond wiring the FAB to open the existing modal.
